heading: Step 1: Ensure that you add the following dependencies to your project.
body:
- MongoDB

  ```
  mongodb-driver-kotlin-coroutine
  ```

  To learn more, see [Add MongoDB as a Dependency](kotlin/coroutine/current/quick-start).

- Serialization Library

  ```
  bson-kotlinx
  ```

  To learn more, see [Add Serialization Library Dependencies](kotlin/coroutine/current/quick-start).
